message:
fix(events): prevent EventBus deadlock when handler calls deregister

fire() and fire_counted() held a read lock while invoking handlers,
deadlocking if a handler called deregister() (which needs a write lock).
Fix by collecting matching handler Arcs into a Vec (releasing the read
lock), then invoking them. Extract matching_handlers() and
handler_matches_event_type() helpers. Add two deadlock-regression tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
